legal_notice.title: Sovereign Trace Protocol — Auditor Certification Application
content: This application is reviewed Monday and Tuesday only.
Review is skills-based. Credentials and degrees are not evaluated.
What is evaluated: your demonstrated ability to read AI outputs honestly.
**Term:** 1 year from badge issuance. Renewable by reapplication.
**Annual cap:** 50 sealed audits per calendar year per badge.
**Badge is non-transferable.** It is bound to your name and LinkedIn permanently.
Intake is reviewed by Sheldon K. Salmon personally.
Not every application is accepted. There is no appeal process.

fields.label: Full Legal Name
fields.description: This is what will appear on your badge if approved.

fields.label: LinkedIn Profile URL
fields.description: Must be a real, active LinkedIn profile. This is your identity anchor.

fields.label: Primary Specialization
fields.description: Select the domain where your AI output review skills are strongest.

fields.label: Professional Background
fields.description: Describe your relevant experience. No degrees required. Describe what you have actually done.
fields.placeholder: 3 years reviewing LLM outputs for a fintech company. Built internal red-teaming process. Identified 47 documented hallucination events.

fields.label: Skills Sample — Upload or Describe
fields.description: Upload a sample AI output review you have conducted, OR describe a specific AI failure you identified and how you documented it. This is your skills demonstration.

fields.label: Supporting Files
fields.description: Upload any supporting work samples. PDF preferred.

fields.label: Referral (Optional)
fields.description: If an existing STP Certified Auditor referred you, enter their badge number.

fields.label: Auditor Terms Agreement
options: I understand the badge is non-transferable and bound to my name and LinkedIn permanently.
I understand my badge term is 1 year and must be renewed by reapplication.
I understand I am capped at 50 sealed audits per calendar year.
I understand that bribery, coercion, or misuse of the badge will result in permanent revocation and a public ledger record.
I understand that disputes and revocation proceedings may be referred to a legal review process outside of STP.
I have read and agree to the Sovereign Trace Protocol Terms of Service.

steps: Application review — Conducted Monday/Tuesday by Sheldon K. Salmon.
Skills assessment — Demonstrated ability to read AI outputs honestly.
Badge issuance — If approved, STP-AUDITOR-XXXX badge number assigned.
Notification — You receive your badge number and certification letter.
Term begins — 1 year from issuance date. Renewable by reapplication.
after_submit.footer:
The badge is the authority. The seal is the certification.

Sovereign Trace Protocol | Sheldon K. Salmon | aionsystem2026@gmail.com
